prompt: Someone posted an ad for their paid R course in the R-Ladies community Slack. Should I remove it, and what's our policy on promotion?
assertions: Says promoting commercial products is not allowed on the Slack
Notes a member discount must be cleared with the leadership team first
Contrasts with what IS allowed (jobs, events, resources, #rstats news, questions)
Says if unsure to ask the @Community Management Team in Slack or email slack@rladies.org
Frames it under the community guidelines / Code of Conduct
